name: Apricot-Mango Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups water (use water from rehydrating mangos)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the couscous, turbinado sugar, and water in a bowl until it becomes the consistency of thick oatmeal. Stir in the vanilla extract and let cool.
2. Spread the mixture evenly in a prepared springform pan.
3. Prepare the fruit layer by pressing all the water out of the softened dried mangoes and apricots. Reserve about 1/3 for topping. Puree the reserved fruit, apricot preserves, and enough liquid with the rest of the fruit to create a thick glaze.
4. Spoon the pureed fruit mixture onto the couscous crust in spoonfuls, spreading gently to form a smooth layer.
5. Spread the reserved fruit glaze over the tofu layer.
6. Sprinkle roasted pecan fragments on top.
7. Let set for at least two hours before slicing carefully.
